problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus may resolve What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
